questions.question: What year was the first iPhone released?
questions.explanation: The first iPhone was introduced in 2007 by Steve Jobs.

questions.question: Who created the social network Facebook?
questions.explanation: Mark Zuckerberg created Facebook in 2004 while a student at Harvard University.

questions.question: What does the abbreviation HTML mean?
questions.explanation: HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language and is the basic language for creating web pages.

questions.question: In what year was the Instagram platform founded?
questions.explanation: Instagram was launched in October 2010 and gained 25,000 users on its first day.

questions.question: Which game became the most popular game in the world in terms of the number of copies sold?
questions.explanation: Minecraft is the best-selling game in the world, with over 300 million copies sold.

questions.question: Which company created the PlayStation game console?
questions.explanation: The PlayStation console was created by the Japanese company Sony, the first version appeared in 1994.

questions.question: In what year was the first website created?
questions.explanation: The first website was created in 1991 by Tim Berners-Lee at the CERN laboratory.

questions.question: Who is the company behind the TikTok app?
questions.explanation: TikTok was created by the Chinese company ByteDance, and the international version was launched in 2017.

questions.question: Which mobile operating system has the largest global market share?
questions.explanation: The Android operating system occupies about 72% of the global market and is more popular than iOS.

questions.question: What year was Google founded?
questions.explanation: Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin in 1998 while they were students at Stanford University.

questions.question: Who are the developers of Fortnite?
questions.explanation: Fortnite was created by the Epic Games company, and the game became extremely popular in 2018.

questions.question: What does artificial intelligence (AI) do?
options: Learns from data and performs tasks normally performed by humans
questions.explanation: Artificial intelligence learns from large amounts of data and can perform complex tasks.

questions.question: Who founded Tesla and SpaceX?
questions.explanation: Elon Musk is the CEO and co-founder of Tesla and SpaceX.

questions.question: Which programming language is most commonly used to create websites?
questions.explanation: JavaScript is the most popular programming language for creating websites and works in all browsers.

questions.question: What robot was the first to land on Mars and send pictures?
questions.explanation: Sojourner was the first rover to successfully land on Mars in 1997 and send back pictures.
